mode.title: How do you want to use BalanceOS?
mode.subtitle: You can change this later in settings.
mode.expertDesc: Set your own calorie and macro targets. Full control, no hand-holding.
mode.guidedDesc: We'll help you choose targets that fit your goals.

guided.title: We'll help you get set up
guided.body1: BalanceOS will guide you through choosing calorie and macro targets based on your goals. You can adjust everything manually at any time.
guided.body2: Guided target setup is coming soon. For now, we'll apply sensible defaults and you can update them from settings.
